# x402 Video — pay-per-call AI video generation

> No accounts, no API keys, no credit cards.
> HTTP 402 -> pay USDC on Base (eip155:8453) -> video generates.
> Any x402 client works; `@x402/fetch` handles 402 -> pay -> retry automatically.

## Endpoints (live quotes at GET https://api.x402video.com/)

| Endpoint | Output | Price |
|---|---|---|
| POST https://api.x402video.com/generate/seedance-fast/5s-720p | 5s 720p MP4 | ~$0.45 / call |
| POST https://api.x402video.com/generate/seedance/5s-720p | 5s 720p MP4 (highest quality) | ~$0.56 / call |
| POST https://api.x402video.com/generate/seedance-fast/custom | 4-15s, 480p/720p, optional audio | $0.13-$1.49 |
| POST https://api.x402video.com/generate/seedance/custom | 4-15s, up to 1080p, optional audio | $0.27-$4.62 |

The 402 response always quotes the exact USDC amount for your request before you pay.
Custom body fields: { prompt, duration 4-15, resolution "480p"|"720p"|"1080p", ratio, seed, generate_audio, camera_fixed }.

## Quickstart (raw curl — see the 402 flow)

curl -i -X POST https://api.x402video.com/generate/seedance-fast/5s-720p \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -d '{"prompt":"a dog on the moon"}'
# -> HTTP 402 with exact USDC payment requirements (scheme "exact", USDC on Base)
# -> resend with X-PAYMENT header (any x402 client signs this for you) -> 200 { job_id, status_url }
# -> GET https://api.x402video.com/jobs/:id (free) until status "succeeded"
# -> download video_url within 24h (link expires)

Payments are gasless for the buyer (EIP-3009 signature; the facilitator submits the tx).
Prompts are screened before payment — rejected requests (403), rate limits (429),
and capacity rejections (503) are never charged.

## Machine-readable resources

- https://api.x402video.com/llms.txt — canonical agent-readable storefront (live SKUs/prices)
- https://api.x402video.com/ — storefront (JSON)
- https://api.x402video.com/openapi.json — OpenAPI spec with x-payment-info pricing
- https://api.x402video.com/.well-known/x402 — x402 discovery document
- https://api.x402video.com/status — live success rate, p50 generation time, delivered count

## What people build with this

- Ad creative / high-frequency variant generation → POST /generate/seedance-fast/5s-720p (~$0.45/clip)
- Product demo b-roll / landing-page cinematic clips → POST /generate/seedance/5s-720p (~$0.56/clip)
- Social shorts 9:16 vertical (TikTok / Reels / Shorts) → POST /generate/seedance-fast/custom with ratio "9:16"
- Blog & news auto b-roll (LLM reads article → prompt → video) → POST /generate/seedance-fast/5s-720p (~$0.45/clip)
- Game / film previz & storyboard prototyping → POST /generate/seedance/custom (up to 15s, 1080p, $0.27–$4.62)
- Agent-to-agent commerce / autonomous pipeline purchasing → any endpoint; x402 lets agents pay with a USDC wallet, no human OAuth needed

Full use-case page: https://x402video.com/use-cases/

## Humans

- https://x402video.com — landing page
- https://github.com/x402-video/web/blob/main/GETTING-STARTED.md — zero to first video in 5 minutes
- https://github.com/x402-video — source
- https://makereel.xyz — MakeReel (questions, support, early users)
